sidebar.noVaults: No vaults yet. Add a folder to get started.
sidebar.name: Name
sidebar.noHeaders: No headers found in this file

vault.name: Name
vault.commitDebounceHint: Counted from the last autosave; new edits reset it.
vault.removeVaultHint: The repository on disk will remain intact. This only removes the vault from the application.
vault.removeVaultClearSettings: Delete app settings and states related to this repository
vault.removeVaultClearSettingsHint: Nothing is deleted from the repository itself; only application data is cleared.
vault.deleteGroupHint: Vaults inside this group will be ungrouped. No files or data will be deleted.
vault.editVaultDesc: Configure name, path, git and filters for the selected vault
vault.removeHint: The repository on disk is not deleted. Only the app entry and related settings are removed.
vault.contentTypeVaultDesc: A vault of disparate documents without a fixed structure.
vault.contentTypeBlogDesc: A static blog. It is assumed that you are using the Vitepress template https://github.com/bozonx/vitepress-theme-neptu-blog.git and the file structure will be appropriate.
vault.contentTypeSiteDesc: An informational site. You can use any static site generators. Consider the Neptu landing informational site template https://github.com/bozonx/vitepress-theme-neptu-landing.git based on Vitepress.
vault.contentTypeCustomDesc: Custom structure. You define the content folder and filters yourself. Language mode can also be configured.
vault.excludesHint: Paths relative to vault root that will be hidden from the file tree.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Application-wide preferences (stored in the Tauri app config directory)
settings.tabDisplayModeHint: How to display open file tabs
settings.themeHint: Switch between light and dark modes.
settings.layoutModeHint: Switch between desktop and mobile interfaces.
settings.autosaveDebounceHint: Applies to every vault — how long to wait after the last keystroke before writing the file to disk.
settings.defaultCommitDebounceHint: Used as the default for new git vaults in auto-commit mode. The timer starts after each autosave and resets on new edits.
settings.defaultCommitModeHint: Default mode for git vaults set to follow config.
settings.gitAutoMessageHint: When enabled, manual commits use an auto-generated message instead of prompting.
settings.authorHint: Leave empty to use git's global config
settings.storageInfo1: App settings are stored in the Tauri app config directory.
settings.storageInfo2: Vaults, groups and shared settings are stored in the .neptu folder inside the main repository.
settings.confirmDeleteHint: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting files or folders.
settings.useTrash: Move deleted files to trash (.trash folder) in local vaults
settings.currentFolderHint: Changing this moves the .neptu folder to the new location.

welcome.title: Welcome to Neptu
welcome.description: Choose a main repository — a folder where your notes will live.
welcome.info1: The main repository is just a regular folder on your computer.
welcome.info2: It will be added as your first vault.
welcome.info3: App settings are stored in the Tauri app config directory.

toast.gitAuthorHint: Set author name/email in Settings or run `git config --global user.name/email`.
toast.commitPushFailed: Commit & pull done, but push failed
toast.openFilePanelFailed: Failed to open file in new panel

editor.noFileSelected: Select or create a markdown file to start editing

error.tauriRequiredDesc: Neptu needs the Tauri runtime to access the filesystem. Run `pnpm tauri:dev` instead of `pnpm dev`.
error.notGitRepo: Selected folder is not a git repository

search.startTyping: Type to search across all vaults
